queries.question: Show customs officers and immigration officers at Gatwick airport.
queries.sql:
SELECT Customs.CustomOfficerName as name
FROM Customs
WHERE Customs.Airport = "Gatwick"
UNION
SELECT Immigration.ImmigrationOfficerName as name
FROM Immigration
WHERE Immigration.Airport = "Gatwick"
